+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "backstage-22142-bug-report-getting-started-failing",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "backstage: 🐛 Bug Report: \"Getting Started\" failing",
+    "description": "🐛 Bug Report: \"Getting Started\" failing. This issue affects 15+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify backstage troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your backstage installation:\n```bash\nnpx backstage-cli info\n```\nLook for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review backstage configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant backstage configuration:\n### 📜 Description\n\nSimple app, following [Getting Started](https://backstage.io/docs/getting-started/) Guide fails.\n\n### 👍 Expected behavior\n\nSimple app should just run."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for 🐛 Bug Report: \"Getting Started\" failing",
+        "description": "## Hey, I just made a Pull Request!\n\nThe point of this is to resolve those annoying 'E2E Linux' checks that have been blocking everybody's PRs (9 of them from my team at the moment lol)!\n\nI'm not confident about the decisions underlying #12252 or the answer to 's question\n```yaml\n[0] ERROR in ../../node_modules/swagger-ui-react/node_modules/react-redux/dist/react-redux.mjs 1097:18-45\n[0] export 'useSyncExternalStore' (imported as 'React2') was not found in 'react' (possible exports: Children, Component, Fragment, Profiler, PureComponent, StrictMode, Suspense, __SECRET_INTERNALS_DO_NOT_USE_OR_YOU_WILL_BE_FIRED, cloneElement, createContext, createElement, createFactory, createRef, forwardRef, isValidElement, lazy, memo, useCallback, useContext, useDebugValue, useEffect, useImperativeHandle, useLayoutEffect, useMemo, useReducer, useRef, useState, version)\n[0]\n[0] webpack \n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade backstage to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade backstage:\n```bash\n# Check current version\nnpx backstage-cli info\n# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/backstage/backstage\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm 🐛 Bug Report: \"Getting Started\" failing is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest backstage to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Hey, I just made a Pull Request!\n\nThe point of this is to resolve those annoying 'E2E Linux' checks that have been blocking everybody's PRs (9 of them from my team at the moment lol)!\n\nI'm not confident about the decisions underlying #12252 or the answer to 's question [here](https://github.com/backstage/backstage/issues/22142#issuecomment-1888991931), but I wanted to see this PR run through",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "[0] ERROR in ../../node_modules/swagger-ui-react/node_modules/react-redux/dist/react-redux.mjs 1097:18-45\n[0] export 'useSyncExternalStore' (imported as 'React2') was not found in 'react' (possible exports: Children, Component, Fragment, Profiler, PureComponent, StrictMode, Suspense, __SECRET_INTERNALS_DO_NOT_USE_OR_YOU_WILL_BE_FIRED, cloneElement, createContext, createElement, createFactory, createRef, forwardRef, isValidElement, lazy, memo, useCallback, useContext, useDebugValue, useEffect, useImperativeHandle, useLayoutEffect, useMemo, useReducer, useRef, useState, version)\n[0]\n[0] webpack compiled with 1 error"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
